Interface ImapMailRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<ImapMail,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<ImapMail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<ImapMail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<ImapMail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<ImapMail,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<ImapMail>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<ImapMail,Long>
@Repository public interface ImapMailRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<ImapMail,Long>
Repository responsible for persistence operations related to ImapMail entities.

Provides methods for storing, searching and retrieving synchronized IMAP email messages.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    countByAccountEmailAndFolderName(String accountEmail, String folderName)
    Counts messages stored within a specific mailbox folder.

    Retrieves messages from a folder ordered by sending date.

    Retrieves starred messages for a given account.

    Finds a message using its basic metadata.

    Searches messages using subject, sender and snippet content.

  • Method Details

    • findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameAndUid

      Optional<ImapMail> findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameAndUid(String accountEmail, String folderName, String uid)
      Finds a message using its mailbox identifiers.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder name
      uid - message UID
      Returns:
      matching email message if found

    • findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc

      org.springframework.data.domain.Page<ImapMail> findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc(String accountEmail, String folderName, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Retrieves messages from a folder ordered by sending date.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder name
      pageable - pagination information
      Returns:
      paginated collection of messages

    • findByAccountEmailAndIsStarredTrueOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc

      org.springframework.data.domain.Page<ImapMail> findByAccountEmailAndIsStarredTrueOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc(String accountEmail, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Retrieves starred messages for a given account.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      pageable - pagination information
      Returns:
      paginated collection of starred messages

    • countByAccountEmailAndFolderName

      long countByAccountEmailAndFolderName(String accountEmail, String folderName)
      Counts messages stored within a specific mailbox folder.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder name
      Returns:
      number of stored messages

    • searchMails

      @Query("SELECT m FROM ImapMail m WHERE m.accountEmail = :accountEmail AND m.folderName = :folderName AND (LOWER(m.subject) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :query, '%')) OR LOWER(m.sender) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :query, '%')) OR LOWER(m.snippet) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', :query, '%'))) ORDER BY m.sentDate DESC, m.id DESC") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<ImapMail> searchMails(@Param("accountEmail") String accountEmail, @Param("folderName") String folderName, @Param("query") String query, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Searches messages using subject, sender and snippet content.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      folderName - mailbox folder name
      query - search phrase
      pageable - pagination information
      Returns:
      paginated collection of matching messages

    • findFirstByAccountEmailAndSenderAndSubjectAndSentDate

      Optional<ImapMail> findFirstByAccountEmailAndSenderAndSubjectAndSentDate(String accountEmail, String senderEmail, String subject, Date sentDate)
      Finds a message using its basic metadata.
      Parameters:
      accountEmail - email account address
      senderEmail - sender email address
      subject - message subject
      sentDate - message sending date
      Returns:
      matching email message if found
